field_values.action_summary: While observing the landscape, the protagonist becomes mesmerized by Mars (the red star). He feels an irresistible pull toward it. As he closes his eyes, he is violently transported through space into darkness and cold.
field_values.emotional_beat: From mesmerized trance to sudden, overwhelming cosmic displacement.
field_values.camera_intent: Extreme Wide shots of landscape and Mars; Close-ups of eyes reflecting the red star; Abstract VFX sequences with motion blur and light streaks
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Consistent brightness and visual appearance of Mars (the red star)
Seamless transition from rocky_gorge_canyon to deep_space_void
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish a high-concept transition from a grounded, nocturnal mountain landscape to an abstract cosmic void. The sequence must pivot on the visual presence of Mars to trigger a violent, non-linear displacement of the protagonist.

## Required Cast
- protagonist

## Required Environments
- rocky_gorge_canyon
- deep_space_void

## Continuity Constraints
- Consistent brightness and visual appearance of Mars (the red star)
- Seamless transition from rocky_gorge_canyon to deep_space_void

## Beat List
- BT001: Observation of the landscape and Mars
- BT002: Mesmerized trance
- BT003: Cosmic displacement
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
